# `x-visit-folders`

Register subdirectories with zoxide


- **Usage**: `x-visit-folders [FLAGS] [directory]`

## Arguments

### `[directory]`

Target directory (default: current)

## Flags

### `--dry-run`

Show what would be registered

### `--verbose`

Verbose output

### `--help`

Show help
